title: Apparent opioid-related deaths in Canada (2016): poster - Canada.ca
content:
## Apparent opioid-related deaths in Canada (2016): poster

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.

2458 apparent opioid-related deaths
death rate of 8.8 per 100,000 population
Map of Canada showing apparent opioid-related death rates per 100,000 population across the provinces and territories for 2016.
Based on available preliminary data as of May 26, 2017. Data from Quebec are not available at this time.
This figure may change as more updated data become available.
While the uniform definition of apparent opioid-related death is being implemented, provincial/territorial differences in reporting remain.
